text: The public square is high-friction and low-trust.

text: CHART OR NEWS COLLAGE
textPreview: CHART OR NEWS COLLAGE

text: Existing feeds reward speed, performance, and certainty. Parallax is built for the missing opposite: time-bounded, moderated, human exchange.
textPreview: Existing feeds reward speed, performance, and certainty. Parallax is built for the missing opposite: time-bounded, moderated, human excha...

text: Sources: Pew Research Center, 2022; Gallup, 2024.
textPreview: Sources: Pew Research Center, 2022; Gallup, 2024.

text: RATIONALE
textPreview: RATIONALE

text: Rationale: make disagreement useful again.
textPreview: Rationale: make disagreement useful again.

text: Host real conversations where people test ideas instead of performing identity.
textPreview: Host real conversations where people test ideas instead of performing identity.

text: Build debate skills: listening, framing, evidence, rebuttal, and respectful exits.
textPreview: Build debate skills: listening, framing, evidence, rebuttal, and respectful exits.

text: Create a civic learning loop for an increasingly polarised society.
textPreview: Create a civic learning loop for an increasingly polarised society.

text: Core belief
textPreview: Core belief

text: People do not need another comment section. They need a room, a counterview, and enough context to stay honest.
textPreview: People do not need another comment section. They need a room, a counterview, and enough context to stay honest.

text: Context: U.S. Surgeon General Advisory on Social Connection, 2023; Parallax product rationale.
textPreview: Context: U.S. Surgeon General Advisory on Social Connection, 2023; Parallax product rationale.

text: How Parallax works.

textPreview: Answer a short values scan

textPreview: The app builds a lightweight signal for matching and prompts.

textPreview: Choose a live tension

textPreview: Users pick the question they actually want to sit inside.

textPreview: Enter a moderated room

text: Video opens with context cards, safety controls, and exit paths.
textPreview: Video opens with context cards, safety controls, and exit paths.

text: Reflect and improve
textPreview: Reflect and improve

text: Post-room prompts turn conversation into debate-skill growth.
textPreview: Post-room prompts turn conversation into debate-skill growth.

text: APP SCREENSHOT
textPreview: APP SCREENSHOT

text: TRUST & SAFETY
textPreview: TRUST & SAFETY

text: Designed for honesty without chaos.
textPreview: Designed for honesty without chaos.

text: Anonymous-by-default rooms reduce status games while preserving reporting and escalation.
textPreview: Anonymous-by-default rooms reduce status games while preserving reporting and escalation.

text: Moderation layer: topic boundaries, abuse detection, room controls, and visible exits.
textPreview: Moderation layer: topic boundaries, abuse detection, room controls, and visible exits.

text: Context cards bring factual grounding into the conversation without pretending to referee truth perfectly.
textPreview: Context cards bring factual grounding into the conversation without pretending to referee truth perfectly.

text: Structured prompts help users practice claims, evidence, steelmanning, and rebuttal.
textPreview: Structured prompts help users practice claims, evidence, steelmanning, and rebuttal.

text: SAFETY FLOW IMAGE
textPreview: SAFETY FLOW IMAGE

text: Principle: lower the social cost of being curious; raise the cost of bad-faith behavior.
textPreview: Principle: lower the social cost of being curious; raise the cost of bad-faith behavior.

text: SKILL GAP
textPreview: SKILL GAP

text: The skill stack is becoming more valuable.
textPreview: The skill stack is becoming more valuable.

text: of employers expect analytical thinking to be a core skill by 2030, according to WEF.
textPreview: of employers expect analytical thinking to be a core skill by 2030, according to WEF.

text: expect resilience, flexibility, and agility to be core skills by 2030.
textPreview: expect resilience, flexibility, and agility to be core skills by 2030.

text: of AAC&U employer respondents rated critical thinking as very or somewhat important.
textPreview: of AAC&U employer respondents rated critical thinking as very or somewhat important.

text: Parallax turns debate from a one-off performance into a repeatable practice loop: prepare, converse, reflect, improve.
textPreview: Parallax turns debate from a one-off performance into a repeatable practice loop: prepare, converse, reflect, improve.

text: Sources: World Economic Forum, Future of Jobs Report 2025; AAC&U employer survey, 2023.
textPreview: Sources: World Economic Forum, Future of Jobs Report 2025; AAC&U employer survey, 2023.

text: BUSINESS MODEL
textPreview: BUSINESS MODEL

text: Monetisation: recurring, mission-aligned revenue.
textPreview: Monetisation: recurring, mission-aligned revenue.

text: Consumer Plus
textPreview: Consumer Plus

text: Premium rooms, advanced skill reports, custom topic tracks.
textPreview: Premium rooms, advanced skill reports, custom topic tracks.

text: Campus / school licenses
textPreview: Campus / school licenses

text: Cohorts, educator dashboards, debate-club programming, civic learning pilots.
textPreview: Cohorts, educator dashboards, debate-club programming, civic learning pilots.

text: Civic & media partners
textPreview: Civic & media partners

text: Hosted issue rooms around elections, local policy, journalism, and community forums.
textPreview: Hosted issue rooms around elections, local policy, journalism, and community forums.

text: Enterprise L&D
textPreview: Enterprise L&D

text: Practice difficult conversations: feedback, negotiation, leadership, and inclusion topics.
textPreview: Practice difficult conversations: feedback, negotiation, leadership, and inclusion topics.

text: Privacy-preserving analytics only: aggregate learning signals, never raw private conversations as a data product.
textPreview: Privacy-preserving analytics only: aggregate learning signals, never raw private conversations as a data product.

text: GO TO MARKET
textPreview: GO TO MARKET

text: Start with communities that already need better discourse.
textPreview: Start with communities that already need better discourse.

text: Launch pilots with universities, debate societies, civics teachers, and youth leadership programs.
textPreview: Launch pilots with universities, debate societies, civics teachers, and youth leadership programs.

text: Partner with local newsrooms and civic nonprofits around high-salience public questions.
textPreview: Partner with local newsrooms and civic nonprofits around high-salience public questions.

text: Use hosted rooms, facilitator toolkits, and creator-led issue nights to seed repeat behavior.
textPreview: Use hosted rooms, facilitator toolkits, and creator-led issue nights to seed repeat behavior.

text: Parallax is a product bet on a simple cultural need: people want better arguments, but need a safer room to practice them.
